title: South Korea Posts Record 2.06M Foreign Visitors in March — Partly Attributed to BTS Comeback
detail: South Korea's Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism announced on April 16, 2026 that the country recorded 2.06 million foreign visitors in March 2026 — a record high for the month. Multiple industry analysts and media outlets attributed part of the surge to BTS's 'ARIRANG' album release (March 20) and the associated global media attention on Seoul, with tourism officials noting the 'BTS effect' on inbound travel from North America, Southeast Asia, and Europe ahead of the Arirang World Tour launch.

media.caption: South Korea records 2.06 million visitors in March 2026, partly fueled by the BTS comeback

title: HYBE Reveals 2026 Weverse Con Festival Lineup — BTS Absent, On Tour
detail: HYBE revealed the final performer lineup for the 2026 Weverse Con Festival (scheduled June 6–7, 2026 at KSPO DOME, Seoul) on April 16. BTS is not on the lineup — the group is on the Arirang World Tour throughout the festival period. Confirmed performers include ZICO, ENHYPEN, LE SSERAFIM, TXT's SOOBIN, and other HYBE artists. The festival, which gathers fans from the HYBE Weverse community, continues despite BTS's absence on the world tour.

media.caption: HYBE Weverse Con 2026 lineup revealed — BTS on world tour, absent from festival
